AI-powered calling and SMS platform. Aut: AI-powered calling and SMS platform. Automate outbound campaigns, manage leads, and get real-time call analytics.
Create an API key in your Famulor accoun: Create an API key in your Famulor account and paste the value here. Get API key here -> https://app.famulor.de.

List all leads in your account.

Create a new outbound calling campaign.
Start or stop an outbound calling campai: Start or stop an outbound calling campaign.
Initiate an AI-powered phone call to a c: Initiate an AI-powered phone call to a customer.

Retrieve the authenticated user's profil: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile and account balance.
Generate an AI reply from an assistant f: Generate an AI reply from an assistant for a given customer.
Start a new chat conversation with an AI: Start a new chat conversation with an AI assistant.
Retrieve the full message history for a: Retrieve the full message history for a conversation.
Send a message to an existing conversati: Send a message to an existing conversation and receive the assistant's reply.

List approved WhatsApp message templates: List approved WhatsApp message templates for a sender.

Check if a 24-hour WhatsApp messaging se: Check if a 24-hour WhatsApp messaging session is active for a sender and recipient.
